_comment: Required control migrations that must be present in every environment baseline. These represent non-negotiable architectural invariants: tenant isolation, canonical identity, and RLS hardening.

requiredControls.name: initial_release_baseline
requiredControls.rationale: Foundation schema including security schema bootstrap and core billing tables.

requiredControls.name: canonical_identity_baseline
requiredControls.rationale: Defines security.user_has_tenant_access() — the RLS function all tenant-scoped policies depend on.

requiredControls.name: rls_service_role_audit
requiredControls.rationale: Adds tenant-scoped RLS to billing/metering tables; closes service_role bypass gap.

requiredControls.name: harden_provision_tenant_function
requiredControls.rationale: Restricts provision_tenant() to backend-controlled callers only.

requiredControls.name: patch_compute_portfolio_value
requiredControls.rationale: Removes SECURITY DEFINER from compute_portfolio_value() to close cross-tenant data exposure.
